title: Verify loss aversion screen appears when cancelling
description: Test that loss aversion intervention appears when user clicks cancel
preconditions: User is on Trial Corner hub

steps.description: 2. Click 'Cancel Trial' button in Manage Trial section
4. Verify headline displays 'Wait! Don't lose your free days'
5. Verify body text mentions immediate access loss and remaining days

expected_result: Loss aversion exit gate appears with correct messaging
